content:
✅ **Article complete** (1,950 words)

I've created two files in your session workspace:

1. **extracted-content.md** - The outline and examples as requested
2. **full-article.md** - The complete article

The article:
- Follows the 7-section outline structure exactly
- Integrates all 5 examples naturally (surveillance pipeline, SDOH integration, multilingual surveys, HIV registry, disaster mapping)
- Uses appropriate tone for public health researchers focused on inequality and resilience
- Includes key data points (64% success rate, 200K tokens, $3-10/million tokens cost, ASL-2 rating)
- Opens with a compelling natural disaster scenario hook
- Ends with a 4-point call-to-action emphasizing documentation, transparency, community engagement, and access equity

View the full article with: `cat C:\Users\moaid\.copilot\session-state\37922f26-d0b1-45d4-a3d3-cb4d10d3b342\files\full-article.md`
